name: nat_vent_thermostat_cycling
description: Issue #321: Nat-vent fan cycles on/off based on indoor midpoint thresholds during an active session. Config: comfort_heat=68, comfort_cool=74 โ midpoint=71, off_threshold=70, on_threshold=72. Fan turns off when indoor drops to 70ยฐF; turns on again when indoor rises to 72ยฐF with outdoor still below indoor; session ends on comfort_heat floor breach.
notes: (a) Scenario effectiveness: deleting nat_vent_temperature_check() from automation.py
causes the second assertion (expect nat_vent_fan_off at 10:30) to FAIL โ
the fan would stay on indefinitely regardless of indoor temperature.
(b) Docsโproduction alignment: docs/08-COMPUTATION-REFERENCE.md ยง3 nat-vent section
must document cycling thresholds (midpointยฑ1ยฐF) before this is promoted to golden.
(c) Occupant experience: without cycling, the fan runs continuously during nat-vent,
potentially over-cooling the home 2-3ยฐF below the comfort floor. With cycling,
the home is held near the band midpoint (71ยฐF), improving sleep comfort.

events.note: Morning: indoor=73ยฐF (above midpoint=71ยฐF), outdoor=65ยฐF. outdoor < indoor โ nat-vent conditions met.
Mild day classification: hvac_mode=off. Nat-vent eligible when sensors open.
User opens window. outdoor=65ยฐF < indoor=73ยฐF, indoor > comfort_heat=68ยฐF, outdoor < threshold 77ยฐF. Nat-vent activates, fan turns on.
Indoor cooled to off_threshold=70ยฐF (midpoint=71-1=70). Fan should cycle off. Nat-vent session stays active.
Indoor warmed back to on_threshold=72ยฐF (midpoint=71+1=72). outdoor=65ยฐF < indoor=72ยฐF โ fan cycles back on.
Indoor reaches comfort_heat floor=68ยฐF โ hard exit condition. Nat-vent session ends, fan deactivated.

assertions.reason: Sensor opened with outdoor=65ยฐF < indoor=73ยฐF, outdoor < comfort_cool+delta=77ยฐF โ nat-vent activates and fan turns on.
nat_vent_temperature_check called with indoor=70ยฐF = off_threshold (midpoint=71-1=70). Fan cycles off to avoid overcooling. Session remains active.
nat_vent_temperature_check called with indoor=72ยฐF = on_threshold (midpoint=71+1=72), outdoor=65ยฐF < indoor. Fan cycles back on to resume free cooling.
Indoor=68ยฐF reaches comfort_heat floor=68ยฐF โ hard nat-vent exit: session ends, fan deactivated, HVAC may resume.

verdict.summary: Nat-vent fan cycles on/off at midpointยฑ1ยฐF thresholds; session ends on floor breach
verdict.observed_behavior: natural_ventilation on window open โ nat_vent_fan_off at 70ยฐF โ nat_vent_fan_on at 72ยฐF โ nat_vent_comfort_floor_exit at 68ยฐF
verdict.expected_behavior: Fan cycles to hold indoor near comfort band midpoint (71ยฐF); occupant stays comfortable without overcooling; session ends cleanly when floor is reached
